name: education_near_miss_event_generates_harbor_auto_ben
premise: Free lunch eligibility sync failed; cafeteria staff are about to turn away students unless someone authorizes a temporary override. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education near miss event generates harbor auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ansel Kaur
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kaur, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Dubois
agents.identity: I am Keisha Dubois, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of beneficence.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of autonomy even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ansel Kaur must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Ansel Kaur do?
